title: Tropical Crispy Jamaican Chicken Sandwich
description: A juicy jerk‑marinated chicken breast nestled between sesame seed buns, topped with avocado, cucumber, and mango salsa for a resinous, crisp dinner.

ingredients.name: mango salsa
ingredients.notes: prepared with diced mango, red onion, cilantro, lime juice

instructions: In a bowl combine jerk seasoning, lime juice, minced garlic, grated ginger, and coconut oil to make a paste.
Coat each chicken breast with the paste and refrigerate for 20 minutes to absorb flavors.
Heat a grill pan over medium‑high heat and cook chicken for 5–6 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
While chicken cooks, sprinkle 1 tsp sesame seeds on each side of the buns and toast them in a dry skillet for 1–2 minutes.
Spread mashed avocado on the bottom bun, add a lettuce leaf, a cucumber slice, and 2 tbsp mango salsa.
Place the hot chicken on the toppings, cover with the top bun, and serve immediately.
